expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (DIRECTIONDEGREES <= 180) THEN ((CAST(DIRECTIONDEGREES AS INTEGER) + 200) - 20) WHEN (DIRECTIONDEGREES >= 180) THEN ((CAST(DIRECTIONDEGREES AS INTEGER) - 200) + 20) ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE)
(CASE WHEN (DIRECTION = CURRENT_WIND_DIR) THEN 'Headwind   ' ELSE 'No Headwind' END)
(CASE WHEN ((CAST(DIRECTIONDEGREES AS INTEGER) - 180) = CURRENT_WIND_DEGREE) THEN 'Tailwind   ' ELSE 'No Tailwind' END)

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (TILE_NUM  IN (-2 , -1)) THEN 'Easy  ' WHEN (TILE_NUM = 0) THEN 'Normal' WHEN (TILE_NUM = 1) THEN 'Hard  ' ELSE '      ' END)
